pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 17.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain classes or bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 runtime or compilation.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version supporting Java 21.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations or compile on JDK 21.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version and configuration for Java 21.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support JDK 21 compilation features or the 'release' flag correctly.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to enforce Java 21 API usage.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may allow usage of APIs removed or deprecated in Java 21, or fail to properly cross-compile for the target runtime.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

services/mock/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/mock/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics required by the migration.

services/mock/pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to enforce Java 21 API usage.
services/mock/pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might allow usage of APIs deprecated or removed in Java 21, or fail to cross-compile correctly for the target runtime.

services/notification/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/notification/pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile for Java 21 features if the compiler target remains at 17.

services/site/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
services/site/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 21-specific code is introduced.
